candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Although it references cost of revenues, it appears as a more specific component-style operating line rather than a separate same-level D&A line alongside the selected total 'Cost of sales'. Adding it separately would risk double counting relative to the already selected direct COGS row.
This is an explicit amortisation-related operating line near cost of sales, but it also includes impairment, which is out of scope for this task. It should not be selected as a pure D&A add-back row.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation charges in Other operating income and expense
candidates.why: This belongs to other operating income/expense, not to COGS, and should be ignored for this bucket.

variables.notes: No clean standalone COGS-only D&A row should be added separately relative to the selected 'Cost of sales' total. The visible amortisation-related rows are either mixed with impairment, belong to other operating items, or look like sub-components that would risk double counting.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative costs -Intangible Asset Amortization & Impairments
candidates.why: This is the closest SG&A D&A-related row, but it explicitly includes impairments and appears to be a component within the selected total 'Selling, General & Administrative costs'. Since the parent SG&A total is already selected, it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Despite mentioning capitalized R&D, it is explicitly 'in Cost of Revenues', so it aligns with COGS rather than SG&A. Also, R&D expense is already separately selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so this should not be added to XSGA_DA.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation charges in Other operating income and expense
candidates.why: This belongs to other operating income/expense rather than SG&A or the selected R&D/SG&A buckets, so it should be ignored.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A/R&D D&A row should be added. The only SG&A-related amortisation line is a component of the selected SG&A total and is also mixed with impairment, so adding it would risk double counting and violate scope.
